events.name: New Orleans Pelicans at Indiana Pacers

highlights.headline: New Orleans Pelicans vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: New Orleans Pelicans vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (New Orleans Pelicans vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Center Jay Huff had a career-best 29 points and nine rebounds and led five players in double figures as the Indiana Pacers beat the New Orleans Pelicans 127-119 on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Huff's career-high 29 points power Pacers to a 127-119 win over the Pelicans

video.headline: New Orleans Pelicans vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (New Orleans Pelicans vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jaylon Tyson scored a career-high 39 points, Evan Mobley's dunk with 4.8 seconds left was the winner and the short-handed Cleveland Cavaliers completed a two-game sweep of the 76ers in Philadelphia with a 117-115 victory on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tyson scores career-high 39, Mobley hits winner to lift Cavaliers to 2-game sweep of 76ers

video.headline: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Chicago Bulls vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Chicago Bulls vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chicago Bulls vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Michael Porter Jr. made a go-ahead layup with 5.4 seconds remaining after Brooklyn had blown a 20-point lead in the fourth quarter, and the Nets beat the Chicago Bulls 112-109 on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Porter makes go-ahead basket and the Nets beat the Bulls 112-109 to snap a 5-game skid

video.headline: Chicago Bulls vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chicago Bulls vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

highlights.headline: James Harden leads Clippers' comeback to beat Raptors in OT
highlights.description: James Harden tallies 31 points as the Clippers knock off the Raptors in overtime.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (James Harden leads Clippers' comeback to beat Raptors in OT) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

headlines.description: — James Harden had 31 points and 10 assists, Jordan Miller scored 19 points and the Los Angeles Clippers extended their winning streak to five games by beating the Toronto Raptors 121-117 in overtime on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Harden's 31 points, 10 rebounds lead Clippers past Raptors 121-117 in OT for 5th straight win

video.headline: James Harden leads Clippers' comeback to beat Raptors in OT

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (James Harden leads Clippers' comeback to beat Raptors in OT) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Houston Rockets: Game Highlights) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kevin Durant scored 39 points and made a season-best six 3-pointers to lead the Houston Rockets to a 110-105 win over the Minnesota Timberwolves Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kevin Durant's season-high 39 points and clutch free throws lift Rockets over Timberwolves

video.headline: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Houston Rockets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Houston Rockets: Game Highlights) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Domantas Sabonis scored 13 points in his return from a knee injury, Russell Westbrook had 26 and the Sacramento Kings beat the Washington Wizards 128-115 on Friday night for their fourth straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sabonis returns to help Kings beat Wizards 128-115 for 4th straight win
